title: Oncidium hrubyatoides

Oncidium is a genus of orchids, commonly known as dancing ladies or oncidium orchids, which are known for their vibrant flowers and delicate appearance. 

There isn't enough information about the health benefits of Oncidium hrubyatoides specifically, but Oncidium orchids have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Some potential health benefits of Oncidium orchids include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of Oncidium orchids, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, are responsible for their medicinal properties. However, without specific information on Oncidium hrubyatoides, it's difficult to provide a detailed list of bioactive constituents.
